nasb.text: All the prosperous of the earth will eat and worship, All those who go down to the dust will bow before Him, Even he who cannot keep his soul alive.

esv.text: All the prosperous of the earth eat and worship; before him shall bow all who go down to the dust, even the one who could not keep himself alive.

cnv.text: 地上所有富足的人，都必吃喝、敬拜； 所有下到塵土中，不再存活的人， 都在他面前屈身下拜。

ccb.text: 世上的富贵人要敬拜祂， 必归尘土的世人都要敬拜祂。

csbs.text: 地上所有丰足的人都要来吃喝敬拜； 所有下入尘土的——不能保住自己性命的人， 都要在他面前屈身。
